tests.test_name: Playwright - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a single Playwright test file produces valid, fully resolved JSON documentation with at least one named test entry.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after analyzing the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are populated — no placeholders or missing data
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Playwright
At least one test case is documented in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is identifiable by name

tests.test_name: Playwright - PO - test.each expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven Playwright file using test.each produces a separate documented test entry for each data row.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after analyzing the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are populated — no placeholders or missing data
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Playwright
Each test.each data row is expanded into its own test entry in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test entry is identifiable by name

tests.test_name: Playwright - PO - for...of expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven Playwright file using a for...of loop produces a separate documented test entry for each iteration.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after analyzing the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are populated — no placeholders or missing data
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Playwright
Each for...of loop iteration is expanded into its own test entry in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test entry is identifiable by name

tests.test_name: Playwright - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager analyzing a single Playwright test receives documentation that includes a populated test coverage matrix.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after analyzing the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are populated — no placeholders or missing data
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Playwright
At least one test case is documented in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is identifiable by name

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty array test_coverage_matrix
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry for the test

tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager analyzing a data-driven Playwright file using test.each sees a single collapsed test entry whose coverage matrix rows represent each data row with the correct structure.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after analyzing the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are populated — no placeholders or missing data
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Playwright
Data-driven test.each tests are collapsed into a single test entry for QA Manager view

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The collapsed test entry is identifiable by name

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The coverage matrix contains one row per data row from test.each

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for 'playwright'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row follows the expected Playwright-specific data structure

tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager analyzing a data-driven Playwright file using a for...of loop sees a single collapsed test entry whose coverage matrix rows represent each iteration with the correct structure.
